bird.name: Common potoo
bird.summary: The common potoo, or kakuy (Nyctibius griseus), or urutau is one of seven species of birds within the genus Nyctibius. It is notable for it…

locations.name: 千里達及托巴哥
locations.summary: 千里達及托巴哥共和國（英語：Republic of Trinidad and Tobago），通稱千里達及托巴哥（英語：Trinidad and Tobago），是一個位於中美洲加勒比海南部、緊鄰委內瑞拉外海的島國。全國由兩個主要大島——…

relations.subject: Common potoo
relations.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the common potoo is found in Trinidad and Tobago and every mainland South American country except Chile, though it has been recorded in that country as a vagrant

relations.subject: Common potoo
relations.evidence: It has an extremely large range and a population of at least 500,000 mature individuals. However, the population is declining, probably due to habitat destruction
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
